category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the core tool for the Quint specification language; official Quint docs define Quint as a specification language for models and properties.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is quint; official documentation and repository use the display name Quint.
docs_sources: Official Quint documentation site provides documentation, language manual, CLI manual, and introductory docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository https://github.com/informalsystems/quint.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Quint specification language; official docs describe models, properties, simulator, and model checker usage.
